n: To Sandson's Farm: Restocking the Eggs

steps.t: Sandson's Farm is just east of Little Delving. You should run to the chicken farm and return with a basket of fresh eggs before the time runs out.
Sperling Took, the supplier of the Farmers Faire, can be found in Bywater. You should return to Bywater as quickly as you can, taking bites of the pie…
